content.en:
A large number of Dao weapons, half-Dao weapons, divine crystals, chaos stones, various precious materials, elixirs, inheritance scrolls......

In short, there are so many that it's hard to calculate.

"My net worth became dozens of times richer in an instant!"

Ye Tian sighed.

With so many treasures and resources, it was enough for him to cultivate until the middle or even late stages of the Great Dao, and if he traded all those Dao weapons and inheritances, it would even be enough for him to cultivate to the extreme of the Great Dao.

If it is cultivated for others, it is enough to cultivate to the realm of Dao Ancestor, but Ye Tian is different, his foundation is too strong, and his level is far superior to others, so the resources consumed are many times that of others.

But no matter how many resources he consumed, these resources were enough for him to cultivate.

This is also because of the calculation of inflation, after all, the Dao weapon is overflowing, and the value is much, much lower, otherwise using the value of the previous Dao weapon as the standard, then so many resources are enough for Ye Tian to cultivate to the level of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, or even more than that!

"The value of the Dao Weapon will definitely depreciate in the future, and after I go back, I will trade all these things to the Chaos Trading House!" Ye Tian said.

After all, with so many treasures in his hands, if the value depreciates again and again, he is losing a lot of wealth every moment!

At this moment, Ye Tian was thinking about whether to continue to stay in the battlefield ruins.

Judging from the current situation, most of the area of the battlefield ruins has been explored, and although some dojos and sect ruins have not yet been fully developed, it will not be long before they are fully developed.

In addition, the battlefield ruins may also have the same remnants of the Middle Triple Heaven Force as the Sunset Sect, but such ruins are very dangerous, and it is very likely that they will encounter the sleeping True Ancestor of the Middle Triple Heaven Forces.

Therefore, the value of the entire battlefield relics is not very high now.

After the last incident where countless True Monarchs were slaughtered by the True Ancestors of the Sunset Sect, I am afraid that many True Monarchs and even half-step True Ancestors were unwilling to stay in the battlefield ruins and were ready to return to the Quasi-Dao Realm.

"Let's go back, I don't lack resources and treasures for the time being, and the battlefield ruins are not much good at all now, staying here any longer, it's a waste of time, let's leave some treasures and opportunities for other True Monarchs and Quasi-Dao Realm Heavenly Monarchs!"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, after he left the small realm, he came to the exit of the battlefield ruins, and returned to the true kingdom of the god of war from the exit.

After that, Ye Tian came to the Heavenly Ape Giant City.

Heavenly Ape Giant City also has a branch of the Chaos Firm, Ye Tian came to the Chaos Firm branch of the Heavenly Ape Giant City, and a true monarch entertained Ye Tian.

When Ye Tian said that he had a large number of Dao weapons, half-Dao weapons, and various rare materials to trade, he quickly sent ten half-step True Ancestors from the Chaos Merchant Country controlled by the Chaos Merchant Firm.

In the past, the Chaos Trading House only had a few half-step True Ancestors at most, but now with the countless opportunities of the battlefield relics, the number of half-step True Ancestors of the major forces has not known how much has increased.

Just from the fact that the Chaos Trading House casually sent out ten half-step True Ancestors, it can be seen that the number of Chaos Trading Houses' half-step True Ancestors is definitely quite a lot, although it is not more than a hundred, but there are definitely dozens of them.

But this time, Ye Tian's trading volume was too large, and just a half-step True Ancestor couldn't complete the transaction, so he sent ten half-step True Ancestors.

Of course, the Chaos Trading House only traded in accordance with the rules, and it didn't dare to rob Ye Tian.

They also heard about Ye Tian's combat power, which was even more powerful than the incarnation of the ordinary One-Heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and they had killed several incarnations of the One-Heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

No matter how strong they are, they don't dare to rob Ye Tian, otherwise they will be looking for death.

The branch of the Chaos Firm, a vast secret trading floor.

The ten half-step True Ancestors of the Chaos Trading House traded with Ye Tian here, watching Ye Tian take out one Dao Weapon and Half-Dao Weapon after another from the inner universe, as well as a large number of unknown treasures, the number of which was very terrifying.

If in the past, just one Dao weapon was enough to shake the Chaos Trading House, and I am afraid that even the eyes of Dao Ancestors would be attracted, but now Dao weapons are really nothing.

It was very easy for the Divine Heaven Realm to refine Dao weapons, resulting in too many Dao weapons in the Domain Realm, and this time, even if it was just the battlefield relics, a large number of Dao weapons appeared.

Therefore, the value of the Taoist device has fallen I don't know how many times.

But even so, the value of Dao weapons is still very fast, and ordinary true monarchs can't afford to buy Dao weapons.

"Let's trade these first, I don't know if the Chaos Trading House can eat it?" Ye Tian asked.

The appraiser named Xitian Zhenjun hurriedly smiled and said: "Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, rest assured, our Chaos Merchant Bank has strong financial resources, plus this time the major forces have taken out many treasures to trade with our Chaos Merchant Bank, so the financial strength of our Chaos Merchant House has increased countless times compared to the past, which is enough to eat these treasures." I don't know what the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi wants to exchange for? Is it our Chaos Firm's points, or is it bartering? If we settle with Dao Coins, I'm afraid our Chaos Merchant Bank won't be able to take out so many Dao Coins!"

"I want to cultivate resources, whether it is a body refining resource, a resource to enhance divine power, or a resource to refine the divine soul, I want it!"

Ye Tiandao.

"This ......" Xitian Zhenjun was embarrassed: "Wanfa Daozi, now everyone wants to exchange some unwanted treasures for cultivation resources, so the demand for cultivation resources is very tight, our Chaos Business House will definitely not be able to exchange all these treasures of yours for resources, I suggest that Wanfa Daozi exchange some treasures for resources, and some treasures for some inheritance or Heavenly Dao Stones!"

"Heavenly Dao Stone!"

Ye Tian also knew what this thing was, strictly speaking, it was an upgraded version of Dao Coin, which came from the domain realm.

The Heavenly Dao Stone is a kind of energy stone that can only be condensed by the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, containing extremely high energy and Great Dao power, and even contains a trace of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor's understanding.

There were a lot of Heavenly Dao Stones in the battlefield ruins, and even Ye Tian had obtained many Heavenly Dao Stones.

In addition, the major forces and Ye Tian have also obtained the secret technique of condensing the Heavenly Dao Stone, which is an open secret technique in the domain realm, but without the strength of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, there is no way to condense the Heavenly Dao Stone.

Now, the major forces and the entire chaos vaguely regard the Heavenly Dao Stone as the currency of the level of True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor, and the value of one Heavenly Dao Stone is equivalent to 100 million Dao coins.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed to use the Heavenly Dao Stone or Inheritance as a trade.

"Okay, let's estimate the treasure for Wanfa Daozi!"

Xi Tianzhenjun hurriedly said.

Immediately, the ten half-step true ancestors began to sort out these treasures that Ye Tian had taken out and estimated them one by one.

After about half a day, they finished their estimates.

After that, the Chaos Trading House operated, trading a large amount of resources to Ye Tian, and also brought hundreds of Chaos Divine Power Inheritance, various secret art inheritances, and millions of Heavenly Dao Stones.

This is the resource that Ye Tian obtained from the Chaos Trading Bank!
